name: menu-bar-search
title: Menu Bar Search
description: Search and open macOS menu bar items, including icons hidden behind the MacBook notch.
author: aaron_ye

commands.name: index
commands.title: Search Menu Bar Items
commands.description: Open menu bar items from Raycast, including icons hidden behind the MacBook notch.

preferences.name: helperPath
preferences.title: Helper Path
preferences.description: Optional absolute path to a custom menubarctl binary. Leave empty to use the bundled helper.

scripts.build-helper: mkdir -p assets .build/module-cache && env CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=.build/module-cache swiftc helper/menubarctl.swift -o assets/menubarctl
scripts.build: npm run build-helper && ray build -e dist
